title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Hindustan Unilever

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Hindustan Unilever
jsonLd.description:
We at Hindustan Unilever are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hindustan Unilever:
Hindustan Unilever is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Unilever!
